  "findings": [
    "Windshield replaced without performing the required ADAS camera calibration",
    "Forward-facing camera field of view and alignment unverified post-installation"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform static and/or dynamic ADAS camera calibration as specified by the OEM",
    "Verify calibration success with a diagnostic scan tool before releasing the vehicle"
  ],
  "rationale": "Replacing a windshield alters the optical path and mounting angle of the forward-facing ADAS camera. Failing to perform a post-repair calibration violates OEM position statements and can cause critical safety systems like Automatic Emergency Braking (AEB) and Lane Keep Assist (LKA) to malfunction or fail entirely.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Position Statements on ADAS Calibration",
    "I-CAR Best Practices for ADAS Calibration"
  ]
}
